recommendations.title: Infini
recommendations.overview: A search and rescue team are transported through deep space to a distant mining colony to save the sole survivor of a biological outbreak.  During their mission, they find a lethal weapon which is set to arrive on Earth within the hour.

recommendations.title: Planet of the Apes
recommendations.overview: Astronaut Taylor crash lands on a distant planet ruled by apes who use a primitive race of humans for experimentation and sport. Soon Taylor finds himself among the hunted, his life in the hands of a benevolent chimpanzee scientist.

recommendations.title: Fauve
recommendations.overview: Set in a surface mine, two boys sink into a seemingly innocent power game with Mother Nature as the sole observer.

recommendations.title: The Time Machine

recommendations.overview: A Victorian Englishman travels to the far future and finds that humanity has divided into two hostile species.

recommendations.title: Time Trap
recommendations.overview: A group of students become trapped inside a mysterious cave where they discover time passes differently underground than on the surface.
